raw.subject: Your Modesto page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Your extensive gallery of before-and-after photos caught my eye. I love the variety of styles and the clear attention to detail in each transformation.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential clients guessing about your hours or contact information. As a salon, having a clear online presence can make a big difference in attracting new customers.

I sketched out a homepage idea based on the photos and posts you share on Facebook. It includes a services menu that showcases your wide range of offerings, as well as a work gallery that lets customers see your previous work. There's also a prominent booking CTA and a section for hours and location.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/ritz-hair-design-modesto

If building a site like this sounds like something you'd like to explore, I'd be happy to discuss details and pricing in a quick call or email. I work with local businesses on a flat fee basis.
